sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32240" key="e)kkoraki/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκκορᾰκίζω</orth>, in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author></bibl>, perh. <sense id="n32240.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐσκορακίζω</ref> </xr> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκορακίζω.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
